description: Part 5/10: Add box management functions - f_create_box, f_manage_tf_boxes with FULL VISUAL drawing (ObjectCreate rectangles with correct colors, border styles switching from dashed to solid on retest).
steps: Implement CreateTrackedBox() function (f_create_box equivalent) - checks for duplicates, creates TrackedBox struct, assigns colors based on category (entry=blue, scalp=green, intra=red), assigns EM vs non-EM visibility. Does NOT create the MT5 object yet (only when state becomes FORMING with confirmed bar).

Implement ManageTFBoxes() function (f_manage_tf_boxes equivalent) - the large box state machine. Handles all states: FORMING -> ESTABLISHED -> EST_RETEST/FORMING_FRESH/RESPECTED. Creates MT5 rectangle object when box is first confirmed (using CreateRectangle helper). Updates border style: STYLE_DASH when unretested, STYLE_SOLID when retested. Updates border color transparency (100% when unretested for EM patterns, normal when retested). Handles box invalidation (delete when price breaks through). Handles box shrinking (bottom_val/top_val adjustment on retest). Returns [bear_retesting, bull_retesting, bear_retest_pattern, bull_retest_pattern, bear_retest_level, bull_retest_level, bear_est_retest, bull_est_retest, bear_est_retest_valid, bull_est_retest_valid].

In ManageTFBoxes(), when creating rectangle: use OBJ_RECTANGLE with left time = creation_time, right time = current time + extend equivalent (use time + 50*PeriodSeconds()), top/bottom = price levels. Set OBJPROP_COLOR for border, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR for fill, OBJPROP_STYLE for dash/solid, OBJPROP_BACK=true, OBJPROP_WIDTH=1. For EM patterns show text using additional OBJ_TEXT object.
Implement box deletion - when price breaks above bear box top or below bull box bottom, call ObjectDelete and remove from array

Implement box property updates - when border style changes from dashed to solid, call ObjectSetInteger(OBJPROP_STYLE). When box coordinates change (shrinking), call ObjectSetDouble for OBJPROP_PRICE/OBJPROP_PRICE2
Implement the extend-right behavior: on each tick, update the right side time of all active boxes to keep them extended to the right edge of the chart
Commit and push with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 5/10 - Zone box creation and management with visuals'
acceptance_criteria: Zone rectangles are created on chart with correct colors matching Pine Script
Border style correctly switches from dashed to solid when box is retested
Box shrinking works correctly (adjusting coordinates when price enters the zone)
Box deletion works when price invalidates the zone
Boxes extend to right edge of chart
verification: Read the ManageTFBoxes function and verify all state transitions match Pine Script
Verify ObjectCreate/ObjectSet calls use correct OBJPROP constants
findings: Successfully appended 573 lines implementing CreateTrackedBox, ManageTFBoxes, and ExtendAllBoxes. Braces verified balanced (168/168). Color constants are uint but struct uses color type so cast with (color). The ManageTFBoxes function faithfully translates the Pine Script state machine with all states: FORMING, ESTABLISHED, FORMING_FRESH, EST_RETEST, RESPECTED. Protection time calculated as tf_minutes*60*protection_bars (seconds) added to p_t datetime. Non-EM boxes get clrNONE for invisible border/fill.
